name: IdsEdwCapPoolCdDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH source AS (SELECT CAP_POOL_CD_SK, CAP_POOL_CD, CAP.SRC_SYS_CD_SK, CAP.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CAP.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, CAP_POOL_NM, RUN_CYC.STRT_DT CREATE_IDS_REC_PROCESS_DT, COALESCE(CD2.TRGT_CD,'UNK') AS SRC_SYS_CD FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CAP_POOL_CD CAP, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC RUN_CYC, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG CD2 WHERE (CAP.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}) AND CAP.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK = RUN_CYC.RUN_CYC_NO AND RUN_CYC.SUBJ_CD = 'CAPITATION' AND RUN_CYC.TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND CAP.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CD2.CD_MPPNG_SK), detail AS (SELECT CAP_POOL_CD_SK, CAP_POOL_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CAP_POOL_NM, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM source WHERE CAP_POOL_CD_SK <> 0 AND CAP_POOL_CD_SK <> 1), unk AS (SELECT TOP 1 0 AS CAP_POOL_CD_SK, 'UNK' AS CAP_POOL_CD, 'UNK' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 'UNK' AS CAP_POOL_NM, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 0 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK), na AS (SELECT TOP 1 1 AS CAP_POOL_CD_SK, 'NA' AS CAP_POOL_CD, 'NA' AS SRC_SYS_CD, '1753-01-01' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, 'NA' AS CAP_POOL_NM, 100 AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, 1 AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) SELECT CAP_POOL_CD_SK, CAP_POOL_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CAP_POOL_NM, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM detail UNION ALL SELECT CAP_POOL_CD_SK, CAP_POOL_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CAP_POOL_NM, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM unk UNION ALL SELECT CAP_POOL_CD_SK, CAP_POOL_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CAP_POOL_NM, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM na

Description:
COPYRIGHT 2009 BLUE CROSS/BLUE SHIELD OF KANSAS CITY 



PROCESSING:
                Extracts from IDS and pulls into flat file to be bulk loaded into EDW.  Do nothing with the data.  Use lookups to retrieve data from the hash files.

Annotations:
Job : IdsEdwCapPoolCdDExtr
Read from source table CAP_POOL_CD_D from IDS.  Apply Run Cycle filters when applicable to get just the needed rows forward
This is a load ready file conforms to the target table structure.

Write this into a Dataset if the data goes into a PKEY job otherwise write this info into a Sequential file

Please use Metadata available in Table definitions to support data Lineage.
Add Defaults and Null Handling.
